title: Bulletproof: A Lesbian's Guide to Surviving the Plot
original_title: Bulletproof: A Lesbian's Guide to Surviving the Plot
overview: Filmmaker Regan Latimer takes an insightful, immersive, and deeply personal look at  Queer representation in television, and the power of the media to shape how we see ourselves. Witty, fast-paced, and laced with pop culture references, Regan journeys across North America and beyond in her quest to understand the forces that influence the stories we see on our screens. Original animation and personal anecdotes are interwoven with wide-ranging conversations with television insiders, LGBTQ+ community advocates, and people who just love to watch TV. As Latimer navigates an ever-evolving media landscape, the filmmaker learns firsthand that representation done well has the power to transform.
